top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Kevin Warsh takes oath of office as chairman and a member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, and the Federal Open Market Committee unanimously selects Warsh as its chairman

top_signals.title: Airlines, hotels warn against Trump admin threat to international flights to 'sanctuary cities'
top_signals.summary: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin said the Trump administration is considering pulling international flight processing in "sanctuary cities."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.summary: Statistical Notices update the definitions and guidance contained in the Banking Statistics Yellow Folder

top_signals.title: Waymo opens Ojai robotaxis to select riders as company aims to lower cost of fleet expansion
top_signals.summary: Alphabet's Waymo is adding new vehicles to its fleet of public robotaxis and is opening up its roomier Ojai vehicles to some riders.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Meloni spars with defence minister over EU rearmament loans
top_signals.summary: Italian PM threatens to reject bloc’s funding unless Brussels shows more leniency on energy crisis

top_signals.title: Unusual Machines and other drone stocks surge on report Pentagon considering stakes in the industry
top_signals.summary: Drone stocks surged Thursday on a report the Trump administration is in talks to fund several firms, including one in which Donald Trump Jr. is a shareholder.

top_signals.title: KBRA Assigns Preliminary Ratings to Oban Cards 2026-1 PLC
top_signals.summary: KBRA UK (KBRA) assigns preliminary ratings to five classes of notes to be issued under the Oban master trust structure, a UK credit card ABS programme backed by receivables originated and serviced by Vanquis Bank Limited (Vanquis Bank, the Company or the Servicer). The issuance relates to Series 2026-1 (the Series), which will be issued [...]
